_publications._publicationTitle: Ras-driven transcriptome analysis identifies aurora kinase A as a potential malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor therapeutic target.

_contextSnippet: MLN8237 also significantly reduced MPNST cell survival with IC 50 values ranging from 100 nM (S462) to 210 nM (ST8814) and averaging 164 nM
details: Significantly reduced MPNST cell survival with IC50 values ranging from 100 nM (S462) to 210 nM (ST8814) and averaging 164 nM.
